import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 12 or b == 11
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let t = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut count = 0
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(body, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if i > start
          let tok = string.substring(body, start, i)
          if tok == t
            count = count + 1
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if n > start
    let tok = string.substring(body, start, n)
    if tok == t
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
